_meta.description: AR IP 夥伴配飾（穿戴在角色身上的 2.5D 看板圖）

items.name: 小紅帽
items.description: 紅色尖頂小帽，白色絨球
items.prompt: A tiny cute red pointed cone hat with a white fluffy pompom on top and a thin white brim, like a small party wizard hat for a plush toy pet, cherry red color with soft gradient

items.name: 圓框眼鏡
items.prompt: A pair of tiny round-frame glasses for a plush toy pet, warm brown thin frames, slightly oversized round lenses with subtle glass shine, bridge connecting the two lenses, drawn as one connected object

items.name: 好感圍巾
items.prompt: A tiny cozy knitted scarf wrapped in a ring shape as if around a plush toy pet neck, soft pink color with visible chunky knit texture and two short dangling ends with fringe

items.name: 小皇冠
items.prompt: A tiny cute golden crown with five rounded points each topped with a small pink gem sphere, soft warm gold color, toy-like glossy finish, slightly tilted playful angle

items.name: 蝴蝶結
items.prompt: A big cute pink ribbon bow with two rounded loops and two short trailing ribbon tails, soft strawberry pink with lighter pink polka dots, plush fabric look

items.name: 小背包
items.prompt: A tiny cute pastel yellow backpack for a plush toy pet, rounded square shape with a front pocket, small brown straps and a little star badge, soft toy-like material
